payload.answer: Stored an observation that the specified article URL fetch failed with a 404 network error.

entity_resolution.reason: No existing entity id was provided; record host and URL as new candidates.

payload.intent: Remember the outcome of an article URL fetch attempt for memory architecture

memory_cards.statement: A fetch attempt for the article URL (https://example.com/missing) returned an error: 404 network error, so the content could not be retrieved.

details: Captured fetch failure outcome (404 network error) for the requested URL.
Did not store any article content since it was not retrieved.

repair_options: Verify the correct URL/path for the intended article.
Retry the fetch to rule out transient network issues.
Check whether the resource requires authentication or redirects.
Store the retrieved page snapshot or alternative source URL if available.
